strategy: Attack with Ice or Storm (he takes +35% from both); never hit into his 80% Fire resist without a prism.
His only cheats are slow self-blades (a Fireblade on round 5, another on round 6), so there is nothing to play around early.
Stack your blades and traps over rounds 1-4 and add a Feint for the big multiplier.
Land one Ice or Storm hit by round 4-5 and his Fireblades never matter.
cheatNotes: He gives himself a Fireblade on round 5 — a minor self-buff. If your kill lands by round 4-5 it never matters; otherwise expect a slightly bigger Fire hit from him.
A second Fireblade (treasure card) on round 6. Same story — just finish before his buffs stack.
